title: epilobium davuricum subsp. arcticum
intro: Epilobium davuricum subsp. arcticum, also known as the Arctic Willowherb or Siberian Willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Epilobium davuricum subsp. arcticum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is traditionally used in Eastern medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
